creator: rozhuk.im@gmail.com
text:
My wife had seen this on notebook past few years and now it come to my desktop.

https://forum.xfce.org/viewtopic.php?id=15933
https://forum.xfce.org/viewtopic.php?id=16953
https://superuser.com/questions/1536856/xfdesktop-error-after-inactivity-none-of-the-screen-lock-tools-ran-successfully


This is not FreeBSD specific error, I just share my fix for this.
I know that some security freaks may think that this is bad idea to remove such annoying message, and some other ways to fix it exist.
But as user, if I do not install capable with xfce lock screen app - than this is my choice and I do not need such kind of messages many times per day.
